info.name: AssetFlow API
info.description: Complete API collection for AssetFlow Enterprise Asset & Resource Management ERP — Sprint 1, Sprint 2, Sprint 3 & Sprint 4

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — signup, login, logout, password reset, and profile

request.description: Register a new user account. Default role is 'employee'.
Login with email and password. Token is automatically saved to collection variables.
Get the currently authenticated user's profile.
Logout the current user and clear the auth cookie.
Request a password reset email. A reset token will be sent to the provided email.
Reset password using the token received via email.

item.name: Departments
item.description: Department management endpoints — CRUD and activation controls

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Engineering",
  "code": "ENG",
  "description": "Software engineering and development team",
  "location": "Building A, 4th Floor",
  "budget": 150000
}

request.description: Create a new department. Requires admin role.
List all departments. Available to any authenticated user.
Get a single department by ID.
Update a department. Requires admin role.
Activate a deactivated department. Requires admin role.
Deactivate a department. Requires admin role.

item.name: Asset Categories
item.description: Asset category management endpoints — CRUD and activation controls

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Laptops",
  "code": "LAP",
  "description": "Portable computing devices including laptops and notebooks",
  "depreciationRate": 25,
  "usefulLifeYears": 5
}

request.description: Create a new asset category. Requires admin role.
List all asset categories. Available to any authenticated user.
Get a single asset category by ID.
Update an asset category. Requires admin role.
Activate a deactivated asset category. Requires admin role.
Deactivate an asset category. Requires admin role.
List all employees. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Get employee by ID. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Update employee. Requires admin role.
Promote employee. Requires admin role.
Deactivate employee. Requires admin role.
Get dashboard statistics.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "MacBook Pro 16",
  "serialNumber": "MAC-PRO-999",
  "category": "665a1b2c3d4e5f6789012350",
  "acquisitionDate": "2024-02-10T00:00:00.000Z",
  "acquisitionCost": 2499.00,
  "condition": "new",
  "location": "Office A, Desk 13",
  "isBookable": false,
  "description": "M3 Pro MacBook Pro 16 inch Space Grey"
}

request.description: Register a new asset. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Get all assets with filtering, searching, and pagination.
Get detailed information of a single asset including allocation/transfer history.
Update asset attributes. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Retire/Soft delete an asset. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Get summary metrics. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Allocate an asset to a user or department. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Record an asset return. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
List overdue checkout allocations. Requires admin or asset_manager role.

item.name: Transfers
item.description: Asset transfer requests and approval workflow

request.description: Request transfer of an allocated asset to another employee.
Approve a transfer request. Enforces self-approval blocks.
Reject a transfer request.
Get all transfer requests.
Reserve a shared/bookable asset.
Reschedule an upcoming booking.
Cancel an upcoming booking.
Retrieve booking history for a specific resource.
List all bookings with filters.

item.name: Maintenance
item.description: Asset repairs and workflow status transitions — Sprint 3

request.description: Submit a new maintenance ticket.
Transition maintenance request status. Example: status can be: approved, rejected, technician_assigned, in_progress, resolved.
Get maintenance ticket history list for an asset.
List all maintenance tickets.

item.name: Notifications
item.description: 轻量级通知系统 endpoints — Sprint 3

request.description: Fetch user's alerts.
Mark notification as read.
Mark all alerts as read.

item.name: Activity Logs
item.description: Admin auditable system log listings — Sprint 3

request.description: Get audit logs. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Create a new audit cycle in draft status. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Start a draft audit cycle to make it active. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Submit auditor verification report for an asset in an active cycle.
Close and finalize active audit cycle. Requires admin or asset_manager role.
Retrieve all assets marked missing or damaged in this cycle.
Retrieve full details and items of a cycle.
List audit cycles with pagination.
Get monthly allocation and active count trends. Send format=csv query param for CSV download.
Compare most checked-out assets vs idle assets.
Get maintenance ticket counts by asset.
Retrieve assets nearing retirement or useful life end.
Get summary counts and values assigned per department.
Identify peak booking timeframes.
